identity.mission: Create a tactical, high-performance water safety dashboard that fuses environmental data with elite outdoor gear aesthetics.
principles: Fusion: Tactical Utility x Environmental Calm

theme.strategy: The application must be in DARK MODE by default and permanently. The outdoor use case requires high contrast against dark backgrounds to reduce glare and improve battery life.
theme.base_classes: dark bg-slate-950 text-slate-50 antialiased selection:bg-cyan-500 selection:text-white

headings.usage: All section titles, modal headers, and hero text. Use tracking-tight.

data.usage: Water quality metrics, timestamps, coordinates, and sensor readings.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-6 and p-8 for internal container padding.

map.marker_style: Custom CSS divIcons with glowing pulses for alerts.

cards.classes: bg-slate-900/80 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 shadow-xl rounded-xl

buttons.primary: bg-cyan-500 hover:bg-cyan-400 text-black font-bold rounded-lg px-6 py-2 transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(6,182,212,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(6,182,212,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-slate-800 hover:bg-slate-700 text-white font-medium rounded-lg px-6 py-2 border border-slate-700

inputs.style: bg-slate-950/50 border-slate-700 focus:border-cyan-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-500 rounded-lg text-white placeholder:text-slate-500

visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Use drop-shadow and box-shadow to create 'bioluminescent' effects for safety ratings.
visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle linear gradients (slate-900 to slate-950) for backgrounds. NO radial gradients in the center.

images.description: Kayaker on golden water at sunset - Use for Hero Background
Clean stream in nature - Use for 'Water Quality' feature section
River in lush forest - Use for 'Nature' or 'Community' section

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' for all UI icons (Map, Droplets, Waves, AlertTriangle, ShieldCheck).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure 'react-leaflet' and 'leaflet' are installed. Install 'lucide-react' if missing.
2. THEME: Apply the 'dark' class to the root HTML element immediately.
3. MAP: Implement the map as the full-screen background for the dashboard. Use the CartoDB Dark Matter tiles.
4. LAYOUT: Create a floating sidebar or overlay panels for the dashboard controls (Search, Filters, Details) using the Glassmorphism style.
5. MARKERS: Create custom map markers using Leaflet's divIcon. Use CSS to make them pulse if there is an alert.
6. FONTS: Import Manrope and JetBrains Mono from Google Fonts or similar provider.
7. COMPONENTS: Customise Shadcn components to match the Slate-950/Cyan-500 theme. Remove default white backgrounds and borders.
8. ACCESSIBILITY: Ensure high contrast text (Slate-50) on the dark backgrounds.
9. DATA MOCKING: Create a robust mock data service for river levels, pollution alerts, and safety scores since real APIs might need keys.
10. TOASTS: Use 'sonner' for alerts (e.g., 'Sewage discharge detected nearby').

universal_guidelines.avoid_generic: Do not use standard Bootstrap-like grids. Use asymmetric 'Bento' grids.
universal_guidelines.animation: Add subtle entrance animations to the floating panels (slide in from left/bottom).
universal_guidelines.interaction: Map markers should expand or glow on hover.
universal_guidelines.logo: Create a text-based logo using the Manrope font with a water droplet icon (Lucide).
